reviews.review_title: This game does not deserve the hate
reviews.review_description: this game is fun when i play with my friends but im playing in the shooting range right now and im having a blast and who ever mad this game i love your game but im just saying multiplayer does need a bit of work and DEVS if you are reading then can you add new clothes and gloves to the game pleeease!

The game its self on quest stand alone, is in REALLY bad state. Basically unplayable, with that being said i feel there needs yo be more survival vr games. Hopefully they improve on the game with updates. Also if a dev is reading this could your pretty please add a seated mode.
It would be so much better if servers actually showed up, me and my friend tried to play but couldnt get a server to work

Hope the dev sees this because the game really does have great potential. It’s a lot of fun and when you don’t run into bugs it’s awesome. definitely needs some more publicity but I feel if the people who do play this game were incentivized with something like “I’m working on the game but with more players and feedback the haze can come to completion”. I’m no dev or ad rep so take my advice with a grain of salt but I do believe this could do well if you focused effort on it￼
Does anyone know if they have developed this game further?

reviews.review_title: No one plays but still a little fun
reviews.review_description: No body plays this game anymore but it's still playable you find many different  items there is zombie and really fun.but ever you do don't get this game if you're solo,anyway if you guys want to play i will play a lot between October 23 2025 and Halloween please come play if anyone is up to it .
Pretty simple dayz￼ awesome
It was very fun but was buggy like me and my friend lost stuff bc we dropped it and it would go through the Floor sometimes but we loved looting places hunting deer.
Mags and guns fall through floor controls super hard and just all around bad

Usually I'm playing alone because nobody just knows about this amazing game! Now there is a decent amount of bugs and the controls are a bit wonky but you will get used to it. If you get this game it's fun with freinds.

where ever we want you guys to add is like so
 first of all, better grabbing system, also, a system where, like a smaller map or something like that, because sometimes the game lags when you play also it's really good, I just want to , tell you, you guys should add like more guns.
I’ve always loved survival games like this. BUT IT’S FREE??! Yeah… You made the best game I have quite possibly ever played.
I get it’s free so it’s okay if you can’t be bothered to get high priced games. But I personally wouldn’t bother with this game.
Why no one. Don’t know gameplay soooo.. 3 stars update later
Grabing things is a pain and the game is really broken and the only reason I gave it 3 stars was because how hard the developers had worked but it was really bad

reviews.review_title: Lots of potential but needs lots of work
reviews.review_description: The Grabbing mechanics need lots of work and same with the weapon mechanics also the graphics of trees and ground cover makes it really laggy. Also whenever you die it kicks you out of the server which sucks because it’s hard to find servers and when you do find one they’re super hard to join. But the details like the turrets around buildings and the actual animals like elk and zombies are really cool. Lots of potential.

still rough as can be. day night cycle switches 8 times in 10 seconds. grabbing anything is a struggle. backpack sucks. mechanics need to be straightened out. house models look great. doors dont work. in this state it is unplayable but i can see this being fun if the developers put in the work. right now i cant give this more then 1 star.
No one ever plays and the game breaks every other action.

reviews.review_title: Don’t know to join a server
reviews.review_description: I do not know how to join a server or make one and doesn’t help me on how to join one someone help me

It's a good game so far 
It's got good bones 
A great base to expand off of 
It does need more players and more tasks to do
And the places to visit seem a bit empty 
Zombies seem few and far between and have a lack of threat to them 
It's currently slow 
But there's a great game behind all that 
I've been waiting for days vr forever lol its basically that 
On top of the above it needs 
More settings 
Smooth turn
Height adjustment
Hope this helps 
Good luck devs good start

reviews.review_title: The best dayz inspired vr game
reviews.review_description: It has to be the best (or only) dayz inspired vr game and its so fun and its still in early development!
Developer has decided to abandon this software until further notice.

developer_response.body: Sorry you had such a bad experience. As a solo dev I was trying to create an experience I personally hadn't found in the VR realm and unfortunately it really requires a community to get the feeling I wanted players to get from it. I am currently taking a break considering there was not as much of an interest in the concept as I hoped and I'm now working on Split Second a Ready Or Not inspired game. However, I plan to come back to The Haze later now that the Quest 3 has released so that I can make the game what I really wanted it to be. If you were unable to host a match please try switching regions. Hope this helps!

reviews.review_description: Game has so much potential

This is only a beta game and you guys are ripping on it you're going to rip on a game make sure it's finished this game is not finished I'm pretty sure it's far from finished whatever experiences you have the developer will probably fix it in the future just report your bugs this is an app lab game not yet to be released

This game could do so well in f they fixed all the bugs that are around the map. They could start by making it Easier to pick  up items and help with the constant lagging. It would also be nice for the items to respawn back
So far so good but I can’t host a server.
If u broke as hell get if just get ghosts of tabor it's basically the butt 1000x better just play this to goof around

I'm just waiting for the TLC this game deserves lol I'm a big fan of Daz Z and been waiting.. and waiting. I've got other really truly awesome games but I don't have something that hits like Day Z yet. Please put some time into it.
This games got mad potential it might look like a pop up game that had no effort put into it but in the future this game might be the best yet

The haze is really good but there are lots of bugs like floating weapons and it is a pain to pick up items and it’s really cartoony also there’s not much people at all in the game like I see a server but there is like 1 or 2 players and I rarely see any servers. But the dev’s can’t really do anything to make people play but would really want them to make ad’s where to all people that if someone has the game they should get some friends to get it for free. But I can see the devs have put a lot of work into the game I mean it’s good when I can play with my friends. Otherwise this game is really good

reviews.review_title: It ok, not really as I expected.
reviews.review_description:
The concept it good but not really much to do, I know it still beta.
Please add smooth turning I really hate snap turn.

reviews.review_title: For those struggling to host a server…
reviews.review_description: I found that if you switch your server to Europe it lets you host and join easier. It doesn’t add a huge amount of lag either.

This is an amazing idea for a vr game. Looks amazing on the quest 3 even in early development! Yea... it needs to be worked on, but it's still in early development and i think it will turn out great. I am a big fan of DayZ and have been looking for a vr game like this that is close to it. Super excited for it to get finished!! Keep up the good work devs
